jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Easyday
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Easyday! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Easyday:
Easyday is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday!
